title: DAM - digital asset manager - Files gallery

posts.author: tomasburan (Tomas Buran)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello guys, I have my products in Monday DAM and for each one I added thumbnail, link and some other informations. When I create new View “Files Gallery” I can see thumbnails of all my products, but when I choose one, there are missing informations about my products like mentioned links. Is even possible to have some “Asset viewer” when are my thumbnails, but after choose one of them, thumbnail zoom in and I would see additional informations about the product? Thanks.

posts.author: TylerDillon (TylerDillon)
posts.cookedHtml: I see it’s been a while since this topic was discussed, but I’m curious—has anyone found new workarounds or updates for managing digital assets more efficiently in Monday.com? I know the Files Gallery view was mentioned before, but I wonder if any improvements have been made or if anyone has integrated third-party tools to enhance the experience. Would love to hear how you’re handling it now!

posts.author: zzxcasd (asd)
posts.cookedHtml: I use a Files Gallery view for quick previews and better organization. Keeping file naming consistent helps a lot. Subfolders would make things even easier for large collections.

posts.author: preslechoni1985 (Brooke)
posts.cookedHtml: I use a Files Gallery view for quick previews and better organization. Keeping file naming consistent helps a lot. Subfolders would make things even easier for large collections.

posts.author: anowacka (Anna from SolDevelo)
posts.cookedHtml:
@TylerDillon @preslechoni1985

I think you might be interested - we at SolDevelo just released a new app for file management - Advanced File Gallery. It allows you to create file collections and categorize your files by any criteria. Maye you want to give it a try?
